Class IOUtil

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.java.IOUtil
public final class IOUtil extends Object
Provides static methods to work with java IO.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    IOUtil.IFileVisitor
    A visitor which does something with Files.
    static class 
    IOUtil.LineInformation
    A line information returned from computeLineInformation(File) and computeLineInformation(InputStream).

    Description

    BUFFER_SIZE
    The size of used buffers.
    static final Charset
    DEFAULT_CHARSET
    The default charset to use.

      public static final int BUFFER_SIZE
      The size of used buffers.

    • DEFAULT_CHARSET

      public static final Charset DEFAULT_CHARSET
      The default charset to use. The value is independent of the current operating system.

  • Method Details

    • getHomeDirectory

      public static @Nullable File getHomeDirectory()
      Returns the home directory.
      Returns:
      The home directory.

    • getFileExtension

      public static @Nullable String getFileExtension(File file)
      Returns the file extension of the given File if available.
      Parameters:
      file - The file to extract it extension.
      Returns:
      The file extension or null if not available.

    • getFileNameWithoutExtension

      public static String getFileNameWithoutExtension(String fileName)
      Returns the file name without file extension for the given file name with extension.
      Parameters:
      fileName - The file name with extension for that the file name without extension is needed.
      Returns:
      The file name without extension.

    • delete

      public static void delete(File file)
      Deletes the given file/folder with all contained sub files/folders.
      Parameters:
      file - The file/folder to delete.

    • readFrom

      public static @Nullable String readFrom(URL url) throws IOException
      Reads the complete content from the URL.
      Parameters:
      url - The URL to read from.
      Returns:
      The read content or null if the URL is null.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • readFrom

      public static @Nullable String readFrom(URI url) throws IOException
      Reads the complete content from the URL.
      Parameters:
      url - The URL to read from.
      Returns:
      The read content or null if the URL is null.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • readFrom

      public static @Nullable String readFrom(File file) throws IOException
      Reads the complete content from the File.
      Parameters:
      file - The File to read from.
      Returns:
      The read content or null if the File is not an existing file.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • readFrom

      public static String readFrom(InputStream in) throws IOException
      Reads the complete content from the InputStream and closes it.
      Parameters:
      in - The InputStream to read from and to close.
      Returns:
      The read content.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • writeTo

      public static void writeTo(OutputStream out, String content) throws IOException
      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
      Parameters:
      out - The OutputStream to write to.
      content - The content to write.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • writeTo

      public static void writeTo(OutputStream out, String content, Charset encoding) throws IOException
      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
      Parameters:
      out - The OutputStream to write to.
      content - The content to write.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • writeTo

      public static void writeTo(OutputStream out, String content, String encoding) throws IOException
      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
      Parameters:
      out - The OutputStream to write to.
      content - The content to write.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • computeLineInformation

      public static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(File file) throws IOException

      Computes line information for each text line in the given File. A IOUtil.LineInformation consists of the offset from the beginning of the file for each line and the indices of tabs '\t' in each line.

      Example content, line break is '\n': 

      Line 1
Line 2: With some text

Line 4
      Computed line start indices: 
      
result[0] = new LineInformation(0, new int[0]);
result[1] = new LineInformation(7, new int[] {7});
result[2] = new LineInformation(30, new int[0]);
result[3] = new LineInformation(31, new int[0]);

      Parameters:
      file - The given File.
      Returns:
      The computed start indices.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • computeLineInformation

      public static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(InputStream in) throws IOException

      Computes line information for each text line in the given InputStream. A IOUtil.LineInformation consists of the offset from the beginning of the file for each line and the indices of tabs '\t' in each line.

      Example content, line break is '\n': 

      Line 1
Line 2:\tWith some text

Line 4
      Computed line start indices: 
      
result[0] = new LineInformation(0, new int[0]);
result[1] = new LineInformation(7, new int[] {7});
result[2] = new LineInformation(30, new int[0]);
result[3] = new LineInformation(31, new int[0]);

      Parameters:
      in - The given File.
      Returns:
      The computed start indices.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • createTempDirectory

      public static File createTempDirectory(String prefix, String suffix) throws IOException
      Creates a temporary directory with help of File.createTempFile(String, String).
      Parameters:
      prefix - The prefix string to be used in generating the file's name; must be at least three characters long.
      suffix - The suffix string to be used in generating the file's name; may be null, in which case the suffix ".tmp" will be used.
      Returns:
      Created temporary directory.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • search

      public static List<File> search(File file, Predicate<File> filter) throws IOException
      Searches recursive in the given File all Files accepted by the given IFilter.
      Parameters:
      file - The File to start search in.
      filter - An optional Predicate used to accept files. Without a filter all Files are accepted.
      Returns:
      The accepted Files.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception

    • visit

      public static void visit(File file, IOUtil.IFileVisitor visitor) throws IOException
      Visits recursive all files and folders.
      Parameters:
      file - The File to start in.
      visitor - The IOUtil.IFileVisitor which does something with the visited files
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception

    • unifyLineBreaks

      public static InputStream unifyLineBreaks(InputStream in) throws IOException
      Replaces all line breaks (\r, \r\n) in the given InputStream with \n.
      Parameters:
      in - The InputStream to replace line breaks in.
      Returns:
      A new InputStream with with the replaced line breaks.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • contains

      public static boolean contains(Iterable<File> parents, File child)
      Checks if at least one given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
      Parameters:
      parents - The parent File.
      child - The child File to check for containment in parents.
      Returns:
      true child is contained (recursive) in at least one parent, false child is not contained in any parent.

    • contains

      public static boolean contains(File parent, File child)
      Checks if the given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent File.
      child - The child File to check for containment in parent.
      Returns:
      true child is contained (recursive) in parent, false child is not contained in parent.

    • copy

      public static boolean copy(Reader source, StringWriter target) throws IOException
      Copies the content from the Reader to the Writer.
      Parameters:
      source - The InputStream to read from.
      target - The OutputStream to write to.
      Returns:
      true if copy was performed and false if not performed.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • copy

      public static boolean copy(InputStream source, OutputStream target) throws IOException
      Copies the content from the InputStream to the OutputStream and closes both streams.
      Parameters:
      source - The InputStream to read from.
      target - The OutputStream to write to.
      Returns:
      true if copy was performed and false if not performed.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

      public static @Nullable URL getClassLocationURL(Class<?> classInstance)

    • getClassLocation

      public static @Nullable File getClassLocation(Class<?> classInstance)

      public static @Nullable File getProjectRoot(Class<?> classInstance)

    • toFile

      public static @Nullable File toFile(@Nullable URL url)

    • toFileString

      public static @Nullable String toFileString(@Nullable URL url)

    • toURI

      public static @Nullable URI toURI(@Nullable URL url)

    • getCurrentDirectory

      public static Path getCurrentDirectory()
      Returns the current directory.
      Returns:
      The current directory.

    • getTempDirectory

      public static File getTempDirectory()
      Returns the temporary directory.
      Returns:
      The temporary directory.

    • validateOSIndependentFileName

      public static String validateOSIndependentFileName(String name)
      Ensures that the segment is a valid OS independent path segment meaning that it is a valid file/folder name. Each invalid sign will be replaced by '_'.
      Parameters:
      name - The segment to validate.
      Returns:
      The validated OS independent path segment in which each invalid sign is replaced.

    • extractZip

      public static void extractZip(InputStream in, Path targetDir) throws IOException
      Extracts a ZIP archive to the given target directory.
      Parameters:
      in - the ZIP archive to extract
      targetDir - the directory the extracted files will be located in
      Throws:
      ZipException - if a ZIP format error occurs
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • extractZip

      public static void extractZip(Path archive, Path targetDir) throws IOException
      Extracts a ZIP archive to the given target directory.
      Parameters:
      archive - the ZIP archive to extract
      targetDir - the directory the extracted files will be located in
      Throws:
      ZipException - if a ZIP format error occurs
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • openStream

      public static InputStream openStream(String resourceLocation) throws IOException
      Tries to open a stream with the given file name.
      Parameters:
      resourceLocation - either a URL or a file name
      Throws:
      IOException - if file could not be opened

    • safePath

      public static String safePath(Path path)
      Returns a safe literal for the given path. In particular, avoid backslashes coming from windows platforms.

    • safePathRelativeTo

      public static String safePathRelativeTo(Path source, Path basePath)
      Returns a string, representing the given path to source relatively to basePath.
      Parameters:
      source - a path
      basePath - a directory
      Returns:
      a string that is printable (escaped) for KeY files
